questionHtml: State, with a reason, if bromothymol blue is an appropriate indicator for this titration. Use section 22 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
no AND the end point is not in the sharp part of the curve

OR

no AND the equivalence point does not fall within the end-point/pH range of the indicator

OR

no AND there is a large difference in volume between end point and equivalence point

OR

no AND no sharp rise in pH «near equivalence point» ✔

meta.title: State, with a reason, if bromothymol blue is an appropriate indicator for this titration. Use section 22 of the data booklet.
